GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [supp_nation@0 ASC NULLS LAST, cust_nation@1 ASC NULLS LAST, l_year@2 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[supp_nation@0 ASC NULLS LAST, cust_nation@1 ASC NULLS LAST, l_year@2 ASC NULLS LAST]
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[supp_nation@0 as supp_nation, cust_nation@1 as cust_nation, l_year@2 as l_year, sum(shipping.volume)@3 as revenue]
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year], aggr=[sum(shipping.volume)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([supp_nation@0, cust_nation@1, l_year@2], 8), input_partitions=8
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[supp_nation, cust_nation, l_year], aggr=[sum(shipping.volume)]
              GpuProjectExec: expr=[n_name@4 as supp_nation, n_name@0 as cust_nation, date_part(YEAR, l_shipdate@3) as l_year, l_extendedprice@1 * (Some(1),20,0 - l_discount@2) as volume]
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(n_nationkey@0, c_nationkey@3)], filter=n_name@0 = FRANCE AND n_name@1 = GERMANY OR n_name@0 = GERMANY AND n_name@1 = FRANCE, projection=[1, 2, 3, 4, 6]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([n_nationkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                          GpuFilterExec: predicate=n_name@1 = GERMANY OR n_name@1 = FRANCE
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=10324440
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_nationkey@3], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuProjectExec: expr=[l_extendedprice@1 as l_extendedprice, l_discount@2 as l_discount, l_shipdate@3 as l_shipdate, c_nationkey@4 as c_nationkey, n_name@0 as n_name]
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                            GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(n_nationkey@0, s_nationkey@0)], projection=[1, 3, 4, 5, 6]
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([n_nationkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                                    GpuFilterExec: predicate=n_name@1 = FRANCE OR n_name@1 = GERMANY
                                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                        GpuScanExec: batch_size=10324440
                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                                GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([s_nationkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                  GpuProjectExec: expr=[s_nationkey@1 as s_nationkey, l_extendedprice@2 as l_extendedprice, l_discount@3 as l_discount, l_shipdate@4 as l_shipdate, c_nationkey@0 as c_nationkey]
                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                                      GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(c_custkey@0, o_custkey@4)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                                          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_custkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                            GpuScanExec: batch_size=10324440
                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                                          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_custkey@4], 8), input_partitions=8
                                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                                              GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(l_orderkey@1, o_orderkey@0)], projection=[0, 2, 3, 4, 6]
                                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                                                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_orderkey@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                                                      GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(s_suppkey@0, l_suppkey@1)], projection=[1, 2, 4, 5, 6]
                                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                                                          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([s_suppkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=10324440
                                                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                                                          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_suppkey@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                                                              GpuFilterExec: predicate=l_shipdate@4 >= 1995-01-01 AND l_shipdate@4 <= 1996-12-31
                                                                GpuScanExec: batch_size=10324440
                                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=10324440
                                                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_orderkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=10324440
--- memory ---

                  GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=100, subtree_max_row_bytes=208
